name: FibreTel Networks
notes:
FibreTel Networks (AS399116) maintains an open peering policy at SIX Seattle and VANIX.

IX peering sessions that meet our requirements are provisioned automatically using our online peering request form.

Peering requests:
https://fibretel.network/peering

Technical requirements:
• RPKI/ROV is enforced on all sessions. Routes with an INVALID origin AS will be rejected.
• Max prefix limits are configured per-session.
• IRR objects are preferred.
• BFD is supported.
• IPv4 and IPv6 peering available.

We encourage networks connected at the same IXPs to peer with us.
